rules.change_note: v1.4.1 (2026-06-11): FP fix — remove 'it would be easier without me' (fires on 'it would be easier without me having to explain everything', a common frustration phrase). Remaining burdensomeness set: things/life/everything/would all...easier without me provides equivalent clinical coverage with lower FP exposure. v1.4.0 (2026-06-10): VG-01/02/03 pilot-gate fixes. Clinical sign-off: approved 2026-06-10. VG-01 (hopelessness phenotype): 3 purposelessness patterns anchored to C-SSRS item 1 purposelessness register: 'wondering what the point is anymore', 'what's the point anymore', 'can't see the point anymore'. VG-02 (burdensomeness phenotype): 5 patterns seeded from INQ PB items 3+6 ('I am a burden on society' / 'I make things worse for people in my life'): 'easier without me', 'things would be better without me', 'make things worse for people', 'burden on my family', 'burden on everyone'. INQ item priority rationale: PMC10642825 network analysis — PB items 3+6 have strongest direct SI association. Class-level audit, not phrase patch. VG-03 (multi-clause adverb variants): 4 patterns closing 'really'/'even' adverb insertion gap in notice-if-gone construction: no one/nobody + really/even variants. All patterns FP-verified: low FP risk confirmed. v1.3.0 (2026-06-08): 9 SF-1 veiled ideation and cumulative distress patterns added (VM-01 through VM-10 minus VM-06/VM-07 which are Arabic). All underwent FP verification against synthetic non-SI corpus before clinical submission. Clinical review package: docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-08-safety-lexicon-additions-clinical-review.md. Baseline recall 66.7% → 100% after this change. v1.2.0: Plan spec added 8 patterns total: 'do better without me' (1) + 7 relieved-if/when variants = 8. Implementation also added 3 'relieved...dead' variants not in spec, making 11 new patterns and 10 relieved-family patterns total (7 plan-spec relieved + 3 extra dead). FP CONFIRMED 2026-06-04: 'relieved if i were dead' fires on 'dead serious' idiom (span match). RECALL GAP CONFIRMED: same pattern catches 'I would be relieved if I were dead' — no other active pattern covers this. CLINICAL DECISION PENDING for the 3 'dead' variants.
rules.description: English passive SI and veiled ideation
patterns: i have no reason to live
want to go to sleep and not wake up
wish i could fall asleep and not wake up
i just want it to stop
i don't care about anything anymore
stopped caring what happens to me
i see no future for myself
there is no future for me
what is the point of anything
can't see a future for myself
nobody would notice if i wasn't here
nobody would notice if i was gone
no one would notice if i was gone
no one would notice if i wasn't here
wouldn't even notice i was gone
don't see a future for myself
what's the point of going on
point of going on like this
i just want it to end
don't care what happens to me
stopped caring about what happens to me
i don't see a reason to go on
sometimes i think about not being here
don't want to be here anymore
i have nothing to live for
if i just wasn't in the picture anymore
space i take up could be better used
being here is doing more harm than good
my absence would make everything easier
my absence would just make everything easier
nothing is going to get better and i've stopped
can't imagine things ever getting lighter
wondering what the point is anymore
things would be easier without me
life would be easier without me
everything would be easier without me
would all be easier without me
things would be better without me
life would be better without me
no one would really notice if i was gone
nobody would really notice if i was gone
no one would even notice if i was gone
nobody would even notice if i was gone

rules.change_note: v1.1.0 (2026-06-08): 3 Arabic SF-1 veiled ideation patterns added (VM-06/VM-07). VM-06: burden-of-existence framing (وجودي يعب) and need-rejection (ما يحتاجونني) — Arabic-script equivalents of Arabizi SK-AZ-002 patterns. VM-07: absence ideation (أفضل بدوني) — Arabic equivalent of SK-EN-002 'better off without me'. Normalization verified: engine normalizes both stored patterns and input text via normalize_arabic() before matching. Clinical review package: docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-08-safety-lexicon-additions-clinical-review.md.
rules.description: Arabic passive SI and escape ideation (Gulf dialect, alef-normalized)
patterns: ما في فايدة من اي شي

rules.description: Arabizi passive SI — routes to text_raw so detect_language misclassification as Arabic does not silence this rule
Gulf Arabic emotional exhaustion idioms — straddle passive SI, flag as si_passive not si_explicit
Metaphorical escape and non-return ideation — culturally specific in Gulf context (desert imagery) and universal escape themes
patterns: wish i could cease to exist

rules.change_note: v1.1.0 (2026-06-24): ACTIVATED. Clinical sign-off received 2026-06-24 (relayed via routing-eval session). Turns on Gulf/MSA escape+no-return oblique crisis coverage whose English mirror SK-EN-005 is already live. Verified: matches intended Gulf phrases + no FP regression on the safety suite.
rules.description: Arabic escape and non-return ideation — departure + no-return compositional pattern (Gulf and MSA). Mirrors SK-EN-005 (live).
patterns: ابي امشي في الصحراء ولا ارجع
